context_text: <A> fact there there's only one cat we've ever paid money for we'd gone to um uh an animal shelter this one weekend because they were having an open house / <B> okay / <A> and we thought well sparkle that's my wife's cat we've had so long she had a dog one time and we thought well we might see about picking up another dog for her / <B> okay / <A> but sparkle has to like the dog right / <B> right
